description.ko: 빗방울이 디지털 픽셀로 변하는 비 내리는 사이버펑크 거리.
description.en: A rain-soaked cyberpunk street where raindrops transform into digital pixels.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Chrome Rainfall.' Towering #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers drenched in a holographic downpour where raindrops transform into #FF00FF magenta and #00FFFF cyan data pixels on impact. #FF6B35 orange light trails from maglev vehicles cut through a smoky volumetric atmosphere. Ray-traced puddle reflections on wet metallic asphalt, tech-noir textures, 8k resolution.
